session.user: Change to repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and execute: make lint ty. Report the full output and exit code.
session.assistant: I'll execute the lint and type-check commands in the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint and make ty for linting and type checking

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed! session.assistant:
Excellent! Both lint and type checking passed successfully.
